message:
test(proptest): expand build_coord (15→35) and pool (15→34) property tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

build_coord: clone equality, Debug, pretty/compact JSON, value roundtrip, boundary
durations, optional fields, trailing whitespace, alias consistency, cargo-nextest args.
pool: config clone/Debug/default, stats clone/Debug/field count, error variant
distinction, multiple clear cycles, evict empty, fresh stats, put-acquire cycles.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
